message:
fix(build): Use correct target for Bun.build() API

The Bun.build() JavaScript API only accepts "browser", "bun", or "node"
as valid target values. Platform-specific targets like "bun-darwin-arm64"
are only valid for the CLI command `bun build --compile --target`.

Previously, the script was incorrectly passing the platform target to
Bun.build(), causing TypeError on newer Bun versions. The platform target
is now only used in the compile step where it belongs.

Fixes cross-compilation builds in CI for all platforms:
- Linux x64/arm64
- macOS x64/arm64 (Intel/Apple Silicon)
- Windows x64

References:
- https://bun.sh/docs/bundler (Bun.build API)
- https://bun.com/docs/bundler/executables (cross-compile targets)
